title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems
titleRomaji: Level Count Stop kara Hajimaru, Kamisama-teki Isekai Life: Saikyou Status ni Tensei Shita no de Suki ni Ikimasu
titleEnglish: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems
titleNative: レベルカンストから始まる、神様的異世界ライフ ~最強ステータスに転生したので好きに生きます~
synopsis: After waking to find himself reincarnated and his past-life memories erased, Merlin is looking forward to a life of ease—but his reality is anything but easy! “Blessed” with god-tier stats and divine good looks, he quickly discovers that a normal life is next to impossible for someone who's constantly mistaken for a deity. It doesn't help that being OP means he can barely lift a finger without causing mass destruction! Then there's the issue of all the girls who desperately need his help. Too overpowered and too overrun with damsels in distress—will Merlin ever get to kick back and enjoy his new life? (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: The Mask of Truth
titleNative: 真理面具
synopsis: By chance, Wu Mian obtained a mask that forces absolute obedience on other people. But even then, he couldn't muster up the courage to confess to the girl he had a crush on. Until an incident that turned his life completely upside down... (Source: QQ, translated)
authors: Han Tiao De Tie Tou Lang

title: Yarinaoshi Koujo no Madou Kakumei: Shokei Sareta Akuyaku Reijou wa Horobiru Kadon wo Tatae Naosu
titleRomaji: Yarinaoshi Koujo no Madou Kakumei: Shokei Sareta Akuyaku Reijou wa Horobiru Kadon wo Tatae Naosu
titleNative: やり直し公女の魔導革命～処刑された悪役令嬢は滅びる家門を立てなおす～
synopsis: Mizuki Miyahara was living her best life, working as a robotics engineer. Ever since she was a child, she had recurring dreams about a lady Leticia, who was falsely accused and executed. One day, she had the same dream as usual, and then she was killed in a traffic accident. She found herself reincarnated as a young Letitia, before her execution. In order to avoid the terrible fate from her dreams, she tries to make a new life. First of all, she must find a way to avoid an engagement with the crown prince, who may be the one behind the plot....... (Source: Hifumishobo, translated)

title: Taoreta Fujin wo Sukutta go Houbi wa, Musume no Bijin Futago to no Otsukiai Deshita.
titleRomaji: Taoreta Fujin wo Sukutta go Houbi wa, Musume no Bijin Futago to no Otsukiai Deshita.
titleNative: 倒れた婦人を救ったご褒美は、娘の美人双子とのお付き合いでした。
synonyms: For Saving an Elderly Collapsed Woman, I Got to Date Her Beautiful Twin Daughters
synopsis: After helping a woman who fainted on the street, I discovered that her daughters are the popular and beautiful twin girls in my class — Yuzuki and Haruka Kotobuki! Before I knew it, both of them seem to have developed feelings for me…? A sweet school harem romantic comedy with two unattainable beauties begins with a simple act of kindness! (Source: Comic Growl, translated)

titleNative: 裏バイト:逃亡禁止
synopsis: Ura baito, also known as a shady part-time job. A gray area job that pays very well. The price you pay is your life. Yume Kokuryo and Nagomi Shirahama are in need of money in a hurry. To that end, they casually dive into various shady part-time jobs.

synopsis: Yeon-U is easily mistaken for a female student due to his soft and delicate appearance. He develops a crush on Hae-Sol Kang, the most popular student in school. However, due to his shy and timid personality, Yeon-U has never spoken to Hae-Sol even once despite being in the same class. (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleRomaji: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleNative: ゼロの魔術師～Sランク勇者パーティを全力でサポートしていたのに追放された最強の魔術師はパーティ恐怖症になったので全力でお一人様無双を始める事にしました～@COMIC
synonyms: Zero Magician: I Was Supporting the S-Rank Hero Party with All My Might. The Strongest Magician Who Was Exiled Developed a Fear of Parties. I Decided to Put All My Effort into Making Each Person Unique.
synopsis: Rude, a magician belonging to an S-rank party, is expelled from the group due to the selfish actions of the hero, Tran. Betrayed by his comrades and heartbroken, Rude abandons the town he had been staying in and sets out on a journey to the neighboring Roland Empire in search of a new home. While on his journey, he defeats a band of thieves attacking a slave caravan. Then, unexpectedly, a beast girl who should have been freed pleads, “Please... I want you to be my master!”...? The strongest mage, abandoned by his comrades, becomes unstoppable in his new home! The Ultimate Heroic Fantasy! (Source: TO Books, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Zero no Majutsushi ~S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita no ni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta no de Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita~

title: Kirishima Gakuen Seitokai Shikkoubu
titleNative: 桐島学園生徒会執行部
synonyms: Kirishima Academy Student Council Executive Board
synopsis: This young adult story is set in the student council of an all-girls school, where the girls work for "freedom and hope." Hiyori Ugaki, a first-year junior high school student, is troubled by a strange man who gets involved with her on the morning train. Hiyori is supposed to like school, but recently she has been feeling uneasy about leaving her house. When she puts her concerns in the student council's suggestion box, an unexpected person helps her out... (Source: natalie.mu, translated)

title: Agnes Kamen
titleNative: アグネス仮面
synopsis: Professional wrestler Yamamoto Jingo just returned to Japan from a 5 year training trip in the US and Mexico, only to be greeted by his now defunct wrestling company: Yamato. He's come to find out that as soon as the president of the company passed away, the rival wrestling group "Teijitsu" took down Yamato. Jingo has now been forced to go seek revenge for the destruction of Yamato by challenging the Teijitsu president. One thing led to another, and now Jingo has been half-forced into working under Teijitsu as the new wrestler from Brazil: Agnes Kamen. (Source: MangaHelpers)

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru
titleRomaji: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru
titleNative: 女神の代行者となった少年、盤上の王となる
synonyms: The Boy Who Became the Goddess's Proxy Rises as the King on the Board.
synopsis: Luca, whose homeland was destroyed by a powerful curse, ended up bearing the curse himself. Determined not to let anyone else suffer the same misfortune, he sets out to uncover the curse's true nature by becoming a top-tier adventurer. Along the way, he meets the goddess Selimys and decides to become her "Proxy" (follower). Thus begins an adventure fantasy where a boy, now a servant of the goddess, races through a world entangled in divine conspiracies alongside his comrades! (Source: Futabasha, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Megami no Daikousha to Natta Shounen, Banjou no Ou to Naru

title: Vampire Knight
titleNative: ヴァンパイア騎士 (ナイト)
synopsis: Cross Academy is attended by two groups of students, the Day Class and the Night Class. At twilight, when the students of the Day Class return to their dorm, they cross paths with the Night Class on their way to school. Yuki Cross and Zero Kiryu are the Guardi
searchTerms: ヴァンパイア騎士 (ナイト)

title: Studio Cabana
titleNative: スタジオカバナ
synopsis: Yukari Maki, a diligent high school girl. One day, she spots her classmate, Yusuke Kusaka, who was rumored to be a delinquent, singing a love song. Never having imagined such a sweet, yet sad, singing voice could come from him, Yukari was instantly captivated—without knowing that it would soon be the beginning of a sad, unrequited love.

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
titleNative: 遊遊じてき。
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)

title: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau
titleRomaji: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau
titleNative: 竜と歩む成り上がり冒険者道 ~用済みとしてSランクパーティから追放された回復魔術師、捨てられた先で最強の神竜を復活させてしまう~
synopsis: Dion, a healer, was thrown into the deepest part of a dungeon in a plot by his fellow party member. As he was facing certain death, he found a wounded dragon there. Dion healed the dragon with the last of his strength, and it turned out that it's a divine dragon named Eldora. Now that Eldora has regained her power, she will join Dion the exiled healer on a journey together as adventurers. Meanwhile, Yuki, the leader of the party that ditched Dion, was searching for him alone....... (Source: Bunkasha, translated)
searchTerms: Ryuu to Ayumu Nariagari Boukensha-dou: Youzumi to shite S-Rank Party kara Tsuihou Sareta Kaifuku Majutsushi, Suterareta Saki de Saikyou no Shinryuu wo Fukkatsu Saseteshimau

title: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleRomaji: Watashi no Kokoro wa Ojisan de Aru
titleEnglish: This Alluring Dark Elf Has the Heart of a Middle-Aged Man!
titleNative: 私の心はおじさんである
synonyms: My Heart Is an Old Man
synopsis: With no friends, family, or romance to speak of, Haruka has lived his life just going through the motions—until the day he awakens in the body of a beautiful, and womanly, dark elf! Suddenly, a world beyond his wildest imagination awaits, and uncontainable excitement races through him. There's just one problem: He gave up on putting himself out there a long time ago and has no idea how to strike up a conversation with other people. Teenagers and (other) women are certainly no exception. But with a bottomless well of mana and a ridiculously tough body to boot, Haruka won't let any overthinking get in the way this time. Little by little, the dark elf works past his (her) fears and self-doubt, forging deep bonds with precious new friends and growing together with them. So begins a heartwarming story of an old man determined to make the most of this new fantastical lease on life! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Bocchi the Rock! Comic Anthology
titleNative: ぼっち・ざ・ろっく！アンソロジーコミック
synopsis: Hitori “Bocchi” Gotoh might find it hard to make friends, but that doesn't mean she's lacking in admirers! This rockin' anthology features a lineup of all-star guest authors ready to take the stage for the ultimate Bocchi the Rock! tribute concert! With a set list featuring hits such as “What If Bocchi Was Totally Ripped?,” “Kessoku Band Tours in Another World,” and “Hitori Gotoh vs the Police,” you'll discover new sides to your favorite characters you never even dreamed of! (Source: Yen Press) Volume 1 (2022/10/27) #Cover illustration: Chiba Sadoru #Illustrations: Matsuda Hikari, Uzaki Uso, Instant, Hoshi, Souma Hajime, HOJI, Iwawa 1. Bocchi the Rock!? (ぼっち・ざ・錠〈ロック〉!?) [Yuichi (ゆいち)] 2. Futari-chan no Okaimono Daisakusen! (ふたりちゃんのお買い物大作戦!) [Takeo Kyuujuu (タケオキュージュウ)] 3. Arigatou Guitar to Kinniku (ありがとうギターと筋肉) [Shirou Urayama] 4. Bocchi-chan no Otoshimono (ぼっちちゃんの落とし物) [Totsuno Takahide] 5. Bocchi-chan vs. Shokushitsu (ぼっちちゃん VS 職質) [Uraya Nagi] 6. Bocchi the Rally! (ぼっち・ざ・らりー!) [Uchino Maiko] 7. Toaru Classmate ga Mita Kessoku Band (とあるクラスメイトが見た結束バンド) [Cornflake (コーンフレーcu)] 8. Kessoku Band to Fushigi na Ehon (結束バンドと不思議な絵本) [Fuku Kitsune] 9. Go to the Burger Shop (GO TO BURGER SHO

tags.name: Shapeshifting
tags.description: Features character(s) who changes one's appearance or form.
